scripts.pod-install: cd ios && RCT_NEW_ARCH_ENABLED=1 bundle exec pod install
scripts.pod-update: cd ios && RCT_NEW_ARCH_ENABLED=1 bundle exec pod update
scripts.build:ios: react-native build-ios --scheme FlyreelSdkReactNativeExample --mode Debug --extra-params "-sdk iphonesimulator CC=clang CPLUSPLUS=clang++ LD=clang LDPLUSPLUS=clang++ GCC_OPTIMIZATION_LEVEL=0 GCC_PRECOMPILE_PREFIX_HEADER=YES ASSETCATALOG_COMPILER_OPTIMIZATION=time DEBUG_INFORMATION_FORMAT=dwarf COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO"
